meta_title: Open-Air Cinema for Hotels, Campsites & Resorts
meta_desc: Treat your customers to an open-air cinema screening: inflatable giant screen, all-in-one package or hire. Premium entertainment, simple set-up, free quote.
hero_title: A film screening under the stars for your customers
hero_desc: An open-air cinema is the perfect way to make a holiday truly special. Hallucine supplies hotels, campsites and resorts with giant inflatable screens — either for permanent installation or for hire — to create unforgettable evenings, set up in just a few minutes.
tout_title: Our solutions for the hospitality industry
tout_desc: Available on a permanent basis for year-round use, or for hire for a specific event.
c1_desc: Screen, projection and sound all in one: a show ready to go, night after night, without the need for a technician.
c2_desc: For a season or an event, enjoy the equipment without having to buy it.
c3_desc: From the poolside to the large lawn: from 3 to 24 metres, ultra-lightweight, set up in minutes.
c4_desc: Discreet sound system, counterweights, covers: everything you need for a professional outdoor screening.
how_title: A recurring activity in four steps
s1_desc: Depending on the venue (terrace, swimming pool, lawn) and the number of guests expected.
s2_desc: A clear quote, whether you’re buying or renting, with no obligation.
s3_desc: Inflated in the air blower in just a few minutes: no need for a technical service provider.
s4_desc: A screen designed for repeated outdoor use, which can be stowed away in an instant.
q1: Which screen is best for a hotel or campsite?
a1: It all depends on the space and the audience. For a terrace or poolside area, a screen measuring 3 to 6 metres is sufficient; for a large lawn, you’ll need a larger one. We’ll help you choose the right size for your venue.
q2: Can the staff install the screen on their own?
a2: Yes. It can be inflated using a blower in just a few minutes, without the need for machinery or a technician. Any member of the team can handle the set-up and packing away.
q3: Is the equipment suitable for repeated outdoor use?
a3: Yes. Our screens are made from durable technical fabrics, and the airtight (TPU) technology is designed for regular outdoor use, season after season.
q4: Buy or rent for a season?
a4: If you run events all summer long every year, the purchase will pay for itself quickly. If you’re just trying it out or organising a one-off event, hiring is more flexible. We’ll advise you based on your plans.
cta_desc: Tell us about your venue and your space, and we’ll provide you with a free, bespoke quote.
